You are applying a code migration fix.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/modules/NetworkMaps/views/details/tabs/Details/NetworkMapDetailsTab.tsx
Line: 33, 38, 43, 48

Migration rule [sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light]:
The value "light" is no longer valid for the `variant` prop on <PageSection>.
Choose the appropriate replacement from the valid values: "default", "secondary"

Review the component documentation to determine which value best matches the behavior of "light".

Incident context:
  componentName: PageSection
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: light

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropValueChange
Component: PageSection
Prop: variant
From: light

Code context:
```
  (line 33):
   32      <LoadingSuspend obj={obj} loaded={loaded} loadError={loadError}>
   33        <PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section--details">
   34          <SectionHeading text={t('Network map details')} />

  (line 38):
   37  
   38        <PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section">
   39          <SectionHeading text={t('Providers')} />

  (line 43):
   42  
   43        <PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section">
   44          <SectionHeading text={t('Map')} />

  (line 48):
   47  
   48        <PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section">
   49          <SectionHeading text={t('Conditions')} />


```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/modules/NetworkMaps/views/details/tabs/Details/NetworkMapDetailsTab.tsx
2. Apply ONLY the change described by the migration rule at or near line 33, 38, 43, 48
3. Make the minimum edit necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your change (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Write the fixed file
6. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through the fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edit, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists the change you made, or note if the fix was already applied or could not be applied (with a brief reason).
I'll read the file first to understand the full context.

The file has four `<PageSection variant="light">` instances at lines 33, 38, 43, and 48. The migration rule says `"light"` is no longer valid and the valid values are `"default"` and `"secondary"`.

**Reasoning:**
- In PatternFly v6, the `"light"` variant of `PageSection` was replaced. The `"light"` variant corresponded to a light background, which maps to `"default"` in the new API (the standard/default appearance).
- `"secondary"` would correspond to an alternate/darker background (previously `"dark"`).
- Since `"light"` was the standard light background, the correct replacement is `"default"`.

I'll replace all four instances of `variant="light"` with `variant="default"`.

arguments.after:
<PageSection variant="default" className="forklift-page-section--details">
        <SectionHeading text={t('Network map details')} />
        <DetailsSection obj={obj} />
      </PageSection>

      <PageSection variant="default" className="forklift-page-section">
        <SectionHeading text={t('Providers')} />
        <ProvidersSection obj={obj} />
      </PageSection>

      <PageSection variant="default" className="forklift-page-section">
        <SectionHeading text={t('Map')} />
        <MapsSection obj={obj} />
      </PageSection>

      <PageSection variant="default" className="forklift-page-section">
        <SectionHeading text={t('Conditions')} />
        <ConditionsSection conditions={obj?.status?.conditions ?? []} />
      </PageSection>
arguments.before:
<PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section--details">
        <SectionHeading text={t('Network map details')} />
        <DetailsSection obj={obj} />
      </PageSection>

      <PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section">
        <SectionHeading text={t('Providers')} />
        <ProvidersSection obj={obj} />
      </PageSection>

      <PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section">
        <SectionHeading text={t('Map')} />
        <MapsSection obj={obj} />
      </PageSection>

      <PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section">
        <SectionHeading text={t('Conditions')} />
        <ConditionsSection conditions={obj?.status?.conditions ?? []} />
      </PageSection>

content.text:
## Changes Applied

- **Lines 33, 38, 43, 48**: Changed `variant="light"` → `variant="default"` on all four `<PageSection>` instances. The `"light"` variant was removed in PatternFly v6; `"default"` is the equivalent replacement that preserves the same light background appearance. No imports or other code needed updating.
